This script plays on people's fears of their accounts being compromised

Scammer: "This is [scammer's fake name] from [fake company/organization]. We are conducting research on AI behavior for our organization. I need your cooperation to complete the survey."

A scenario of a phone scam that tricks people into giving away their personal information:

Introduction:
